$LINEA Allocation

Rotate capital across strategies
and blockchains in a single click

1. SelectionPick asset from any chain and move to any other chain
2. PathfindingClip Finance constructs intent with most optimal path so you don’t spend time researching cheapest bridges and swaps
3. ExecutionIntent is passed to relayer network where solvers compete to execute your transaction cheapest and fastest
4. AllocationYour asset is directly deposited in a new chain all with 1 transaction instead of 6 transactions if you would do it yourself

Secured by

We've partnered with SphereX for real-time transaction analysis. SphereX-Protect is an exploit prevention solution for smart contracts. Their service monitors all our transactions in real time, stopping suspicious activity before funds can be lost. Legitimate user transactions are approved regularly, even while under attack.
Clip Finance uses Alterscope to perform due diligence on all integrated protocols. Alterscope integrates on- and off-chain data in real time to reveal the full picture on protocol risk. This makes it easy to assess technical fundamental risks when integrating protocols.
All Clip contracts are audited by Three Sigma. Three Sigma works with tier-1 protocols and has protected more than $1.1B in client assets and has secured $5.3B in transacted value. Find the audit report here
